subcodes.first_line: O servants of the one true God! O handmaids of the Merciful! “From the outset love was rebellious and bloodthirsty, So as to put every stranger to flight.”
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عباد حق و اماء رحمان عشق ز اول سرکش و خونی بود تا گریزد آنکه بیرونی بود از
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @fire and light; fire and water, @suffering and imprisonment, @pain of love; love as veil
